revisions.long_description: Rolling out nightly/hourly full inventory sync via /api/products/{id}. Replaces on-demand lookups. Expected load: ~2000 RPM per pod steady-state.
Refactored description cache to use LazyLoader for startup performance. No behavior change for cache invalidation path.
Added claude-haiku-20250101 as an alternative route for short-form description generation. No changes to existing routes.
Spring Boot 4.0.4 to 4.0.5 patch bump. No API changes.
Frontend-only changes: better empty-state UI for new tenants.

feature_gates.name: warehouse-full-inventory-sync
feature_gates.description: enable hourly full inventory sync via product API

feature_gates.name: ai-description-lazy-cache
feature_gates.description: use lazy loader for description cache

feature_gates.name: box-size-beta-ui
feature_gates.description: new BoxSize UI for beta tenants
